nodes.label: mdots crate (dcli fork)
nodes.rationale: A fork not a refactor: behaviour preserved, work is mechanical rename+rehome plus whatever CI forces. Self-contained binary crate; no margo crate depends on it and it depends on no margo crate - a workspace member purely for unified build/CI/packaging.

nodes.label: dcli source project (kenanpelit/dcli, ~37k LOC)
nodes.rationale: Relicenced from 0BSD to GPL-3.0-or-later (0BSD permits this, no attribution carried in). Full functional surface vendored verbatim: pacman, nix+nix_eval, flatpak, Lua scripting, ratatui TUI, services, SOPS/age secrets, AUR.

nodes.label: ~/.config/mdots config home + migration
nodes.rationale: A system manifest conceptually separate from compositor/shell config so NOT under ~/.config/margo. First-run one-shot migration copies ~/.config/dcli if ~/.config/mdots absent. Broader ~/.config symlink reorganisation explicitly deferred to a later task.

nodes.label: panic-ratchet CI baseline raise
nodes.rationale: dcli has ~116 unwrap/expect sites; recount with the script's exact exclusions and raise panic-baseline.txt by the measured delta - justified because mdots is a separate CLI binary; a panic cannot take down the compositor or shell. clippy green-up is the largest unknown.

nodes.label: /usr/bin/dcli -> mdots compat symlink
nodes.rationale: Kept so muscle memory and `dcli sync` (the user's mshell pipewire-restart trigger) don't break through the transition.
